text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The academy grounds certainly are vast... Much
like the Mejiro estate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I used to get lost in those halls all the time as a
child. The butler often had to come find me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Grandmother, in her infinite wisdom, decided to
place a number of plushies around the halls to
help me identify where I—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ahem! Please pretend you didn't hear that.
